get.description:
Returns the bulletin active at the specified time.
  • If no time is specified, 'Now' is assumed as the time
  • If no active bulletin exists, the `features` list will be empty.

parameters.description: Timestamp, to search for active bulletins.
Desired language. If the desired language does not exists, a german bulletin will be returned

get.description:
Returns the bulletin active at the specified time.
  • If no time is specified, 'Now' is assumed as the time
  • If no active bulletin exists, the `bulletins` list will be empty.

parameters.description: Timestamp, to search for active bulletins.
Desired language. If the desired language does not exists, a german bulletin will be returned

parameters.description: Desired language. If the desired language does not exists, a german bulletin will be returned

get.description:
Returns the bulletin preview active at the specified time.
  • If no time is specified, 'Now' is assumed as the time
  • If no bulletin draft exists, the `bulletins` list will be empty.

parameters.description: Timestamp, to search for bulletins preview.
Desired language. If the desired language does not exists, a german bulletin will be returned

validTime.title: Valid Time
validTime.description: Valid time defines two ISO 8601 timestamps in UTC or with time zone information.

extFile.title: External File
extFile.description: External file is used to link to external files like maps, thumbnails etc.

metaData.title: Meta Data
metaData.description: Meta data for various uses. Can be used to link to external files like maps, thumbnails etc.

customData.title: Custom Data
customData.description: Custom data can be used to add arbitrary additional information. There can be AWS specific custom data types defined.

provider.title: Avalanche Bulletin Provider
provider.description: Information about the bulletin provider. Defines the name, website and/or contactPerson (which could be the author) of the issuing AWS.

source.title: Avalanche Bulletin Source
source.description: Information about the bulletin source. Either as in a person or with a provider element to specify details about the AWS.

region.title: Region
region.description: Region element describes a (micro) region. The regionID follows the EAWS schema. It is recommended to have the region shape's files with the same IDs in gitlab.com/eaws/eaws-regions. Additionally, the region name can be added.

dangerRatingValue.title: Danger Rating Value
dangerRatingValue.description: Danger rating value, according to EAWS danger scale definition.

elevation.title: Elevation Boundary or Band
elevation.description: Elevation describes either an elevation range below a certain bound (only upperBound is set to a value) or above a certain bound (only lowerBound is set to a value). If both values are set to a value, an elevation band is defined by this property. The value uses a numeric value, not more detailed than 100m resolution. Additionally to the numeric values also 'treeline' is allowed.

aspects.title: Aspects
aspects.description: An aspect can be defined as a set of aspects. The aspects are the expositions as in a eight part (45°) segments. The allowed aspects are the four main cardinal directions and the four intercardinal directions.

validTimePeriod.title: Valid Time Period
validTimePeriod.description: Valid time period can be used to limit the validity of an element to an earlier or later period. It can be used to distinguish danger ratings or avalanche problems.

dangerRating.title: Danger Rating
dangerRating.description: Defines a danger rating, its elevation constraints and the valid time period. If validTimePeriod or elevation are constrained for a rating, it is expected to define a dangerRating for all the other cases.

avalancheProblemType.title: Avalanche Problem Type
avalancheProblemType.description: Expected avalanche problem, according to the EAWS avalanche problem definition.

avalancheSize.title: Expected Avalanche Size
avalancheSize.description: Expected avalanche size, according to the EAWS definition. Integer Value from 1 (small) to 5 (extremely large).

snowpackStability.title: Expected Snowpack Stability
snowpackStability.description: Snowpack stability, according to the EAWS definition. Four stage scale (very poor, poor, fair, good).

frequency.title: Expected Avalanche Frequency
frequency.description: Expected frequency of lowest snowpack stability, according to the EAWS definition. Three stage scale (few, some, many).

coreZoneText.description: Textual description of the core zone

avalancheProblem.title: Avalanche Problem
avalancheProblem.description: Defines an avalanche problem, its time, aspect, and elevation constraints. A textual detail about the affected terrain can be given in the comment field. Also, details about the expected avalanche size, snowpack stability and its frequency can be defined. The implied danger rating value is optional.

texts.title: Texts
texts.description:
Texts contains a highlight and a comment string, where highlights could also be described as a kind of headline for the longer comment. For text-formatting the HTML-Tags
for a new line, (
    ,
      ) and (
    • ,
    • ) for lists, (

      ,

      ) to (

      ,
      ) for headings and (,) for a bold text are allowed.

tendency.title: Avalanche Situation Tendency
tendency.description: Describes the expected tendency of the development of the avalanche situation for a defined time period.

aggregation.description: Indicates which avalanche problems have an identical content and can be grouped.

items.title: Avalanche Problem Type
items.description: Expected avalanche problem, according to the EAWS avalanche problem definition.

validTimePeriod.title: Valid Time Period
validTimePeriod.description: Valid time period can be used to limit the validity of an element to an earlier or later period. It can be used to distinguish danger ratings or avalanche problems.

title.title: Suggested aggregation title
title.description: The proposed aggregation title for the visualization of the bulletin

fill.description: Colour of the highest danger level within the validity time periode.

bulletin.title: Avalanche Bulletin
bulletin.description: Avalanche Bulletin valid for a given set of regions.

publicationTime.title: Publication Time
publicationTime.description: Time and date when the bulletin was issued by the AWS to the Public. ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC or with time zone information.

validTime.title: Valid Time
validTime.description: Date and Time from and until this bulletin is valid. ISO 8601 Timestamp in UTC or with time zone information.

nextUpdate.title: Next Update
nextUpdate.description: Time and date when the next bulletin will be published by the AWS to the Public. ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC or with time zone information.

unscheduled.title: Unscheduled
unscheduled.description: Flag if bulletin is unscheduled or not.

source.title: Source
source.description: Details about the issuer/AWS of the bulletin.

regions.title: Regions
regions.description: Collection of region elements for which this bulletin is valid.

dangerRatings.title: Danger Ratings
dangerRatings.description: Collection of Danger Rating elements for this bulletin.

avalancheProblems.title: Avalanche Problems
avalancheProblems.description: Collection of Avalanche Problem elements for this bulletin.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Contains an optional short text to highlight an exceptionally dangerous situation.

weatherForecast.title: Weather Forecast Synopsis
weatherForecast.description: Texts element with highlight and comment for weather forecast information.

weatherReview.title: Weather Review Synopsis
weatherReview.description: Texts element with highlight and comment for weather review information.

avalancheActivity.title: Avalanche Activity
avalancheActivity.description: Texts element with highlight and comment for the avalanche activity.

snowpackStructure.title: Snowpack Structure
snowpackStructure.description: Texts element with highlight and comment for details on the snowpack structure.

travelAdvisory.title: Travel Advisory
travelAdvisory.description: Texts element with highlight and comment for travel advisory.

tendency.title: Tendency
tendency.description: Tendency element for a detailed description of the expected avalanche situation tendency after the bulletin's period of validity.

fill.description: Colour of the highest danger level within the validity time periode.

fillLater.description: Colour of the later danger level within the validity time periode, if exists.

fillEarlier.description: Colour of the earlier danger level within the validity time periode, if exists.

bulletin_list_caamlv6_response.description: List of Avalanche Bulletin CAAMLv6 Collection

tags.name: V4
tags.description:
Release Notes
  • The value type of elevation lower and upper bound is now a string instead of number.
  • The full montain is now represented as an empty elevation object "elevation": {} instead of "elevation": {"lowerBound": 0, "upperBound":null}
  • With the exception of the empty elevation object, all empty values such as empty strings "" , null or empty objects ({}) have been removed recursively
    For example:
    {"mainValue": "low", "elevation": null, "aspects": [], "validTimePeriod": "all_day", "customData": {"CH": {"subdivision": null}}}
    is now renderd as
    {"mainValue": "low", "validTimePeriod": "all_day"}
